## Summary
Provide a brief summary of the changes and the motivation behind them.

## Related Issue
Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / Tech Debt (internal cleanup)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Changed Areas
- [ ] `apps/web` (Frontend)
- [ ] `apps/api` (Backend)
- [ ] `apps/worker` (Background jobs)
- [ ] `prisma/schema.prisma` (Database)

## Test Steps
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. 
1. `npm run dev`
2. Navigate to '...'
3. Perform action '...'
4. Verify result '...'

## Risk Level
- [ ] **Low**: Documentation, styling, or isolated logic.
- [ ] **Medium**: Core business logic or existing API changes.
- [ ] **High**: Database migrations, breaking API changes, or architectural shifts.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings / lint errors
- [ ] I have checked that my changes do not break the build (`npm run build`)
